title: Market Analysis Brief: PM operating systems
category_summary: The category is shifting from drafting assistance toward trusted operating systems with evidence visibility and workflow continuity.
trend_summary: Platform products are bundling more workflow support while startups differentiate on synthesis depth and usability.
market_dynamics: Bundled ecosystems can compress standalone tool adoption.
Trust and traceability are becoming category-level expectations.
ecosystem_dependencies: Tracker integration quality shapes day-to-day product value.
Workflow lock-in around Atlassian and adjacent systems remains strong.
regulatory_considerations: Enterprise adoption may require explainability and retention controls.
moat_pressures: Generic drafting features are being commoditized quickly.
key_uncertainties: How quickly PM buyers will shift budget from point tools to operating-system products.
